MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Oct-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lisa A. Corman-Roberts for plaintiff and moving party: Bonnie Brown

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Plaintiff's motion to compel responses from defendant Furnelli to request for production of documents and special is: GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $686.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS
Off Calendar Oct-12-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lisa A. Corman-Roberts for plaintiff and moving party: Bonnie Brown

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses from defendant Furnelli to requests for admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The objections are overruled and stricken. Defendant is ordered to serve supplemental responses within 21 days of notice of this order. The Court finds that defendant asserted unmeritorious objections. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $260 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E.
